FIFA World Cup 2026

USA · Canada · México

11 juin – 19 juillet 2026
48 nations · 104 matchs
Horaires heure de Paris
Qualifiés directs (2 premiers)
3e — possible qualifié
💡 Clique sur une équipe pour voir l'effectif
Phase de groupes — 11 au 27 juin
Récompenses du tournoi — tes pronostics
Classement officiel des buteurs & passeurs — tous groupes confondus
Phase à élimination directe — saisis les scores pour faire avancer les équipes
FIFA World Cup 2026 · USA · Canada · México · 48 nations · 104 matchs
Historical match & scorer data: Fjelstul World Cup Database © 2023 Joshua C. Fjelstul, Ph.D. · CC-BY-SA 4.0 · modified: reorganized per edition, scorer names abbreviated

Effectif Coupe du Monde 2026
.account-box.save-prompt{border-color:#f0c84a;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(240,200,74,0.22);} .account-loggedout,.account-loggedin{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} .account-eyebrow{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;} .account-title{color:#f0c84a;font-size:20px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.15;margin-top:6px;} .account-fields{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:14px;} .account-ico{font-size:20px;line-height:1;} .account-input{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.28);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.22);border-radius:5px;color:#fff;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:13px;padding:10px 12px;letter-spacing:0.3px;} .account-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .account-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.32);} #login-user{flex:1;min-width:120px;} .account-pin{width:84px;text-align:center;letter-spacing:6px;font-size:15px;} .account-go{flex-shrink:0;} .account-note{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.2px;line-height:1.45;margin-top:12px;} .account-session-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .account-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;flex:1;min-width:140px;} .account-name{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:17px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;color:#f0c84a;} .account-status{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#7ddc8a;text-transform:uppercase;} .account-status.saving{color:#f0c84a;} .account-logout{flex-shrink:0;} .auth-session{justify-content:flex-start;} .auth-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .auth-inline-form{margin:0;display:flex;} /* simple-mode knockout: pick the winner (no score) */ .ko-pick{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;width:100%;text-align:left;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;padding:5px 7px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.12s;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .ko-pick:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.5);background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);color:#fff;} .ko-pick:disabled{opacity:0.4;cursor:not-allowed;} .ko-pick.fr-team{color:#6eb3ff;} .ko-pick.sel{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.16);border-color:#4caf50;color:#fff;font-weight:700;} .ko-pick.sel.champ{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);border-color:#f0c84a;color:#f0c84a;} .ko-pick.dim{opacity:0.45;text-decoration:line-through;} .ko-pick .ko-pick-flag{flex-shrink:0;} .ko-pick .ko-pick-name{flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .ko-pick .ko-pick-chk{flex-shrink:0;font-size:10px;color:#4caf50;} .ko-pick.sel.champ .ko-pick-chk{color:#f0c84a;} /* export format chooser buttons (reuse mini popover) */ .xp-b{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;text-align:left;width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .xp-b:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.14);border-color:#f0c84a;} .xp-ic{font-size:24px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;} .xp-tt{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.5px;} .xp-ds{font-size:10.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);} .xp-b:hover .xp-tt{color:#f0c84a;} .sec-title{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-align:center;margin:18px 0 14px;text-transform:uppercase;} .sec-title::before,.sec-title::after{content:'';display:inline-block;width:30px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);vertical-align:middle;margin:0 10px;} .legend{display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;letter-spacing:0.5px;} .leg-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;} #legend-tip{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);} .leg-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;} .leg-dot.green{background:#4caf50;} .leg-dot.yellow{background:#f0c84a;} .groups-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:24px;} @media(max-width:900px){.groups-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}} @media(max-width:500px){.groups-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .gcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:7px;overflow:hidden;} .ghead{background:rgba(196,158,43,0.12);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,158,43,0.25);padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;} .gletter{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#f0c84a;} .gbadge{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);text-transform:uppercase;} .gmatches{padding:4px 0;} .gmatch{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:3px 8px;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);font-size:9px;} .gmatch:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .mdate{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);min-width:36px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:0.3px;} .mt1,.mt2{flex:1;font-size:8.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);cursor:pointer;transition:color 0.12s;} .mt1:hover,.mt2:hover{color:#f0c84a;} .mt1{text-align:right;} .mt2{text-align:left;} .mscore{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;} .sinput{width:22px;height:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;color:#fff;text-align:center;font-size:12px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-weight:600;padding:0;-moz-appearance:textfield;} .sinput::-webkit-inner-spin-button,.sinput::-webkit-outer-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;} .sinput:focus{outline:none;border-color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.12);} .sdiv{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);padding:0 1px;} .mtime{font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);min-width:26px;text-align:right;letter-spacing:0.3px;} .standing{margin-top:2px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);} .sth{display:grid;grid-template-columns:14px 1fr 18px 18px 18px 18px 20px 24px;gap:2px;padding:3px 8px;font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase;align-items:center;} .sth span:nth-child(n+3){text-align:center;} .srow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:14px 1fr 18px 18px 18px 18px 20px 24px;gap:2px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:9px;align-items:center;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);transition:background 0.2s;cursor:pointer;} .srow:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);} .srow.q{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.07);} .srow.q:hover{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.12);} .srow.q3{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.05);} .srow.q3:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);} .srank{font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-align:center;} .srank.r1,.srank.r2{color:#4caf50;font-weight:700;} .srank.r3{color:#f0c84a;} .steam{font-size:8.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;text-decoration:underline;text-decoration-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);text-underline-offset:2px;} .steam.fr{color:#6eb3ff;font-weight:700;} .sval{text-align:center;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);} .spts{text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#f0c84a;} .ko-section{margin-top:28px;} .rounds-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 0.8fr 1fr;gap:6px;} @media(max-width:900px){.rounds-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}} .round-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;} .round-header{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-align:center;padding:6px 4px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;} .round-header span{display:block;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);margin-top:2px;font-weight:300;} .ko-match{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:5px;padding:5px 7px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;transition:all 0.2s;} .ko-match.has-winner{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.06);border-color:rgba(76,175,80,0.25);} .ko-match.final-match{background:rgba(196,158,43,0.1);border-color:rgba(196,158,43,0.4);padding:8px 10px;} .ko-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;} .ko-team-label{flex:1;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;font-size:11px;} .ko-team-label.placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);font-style:italic;font-size:10px;} .ko-team-label.winner-team{color:#4caf50;font-weight:700;} .ko-team-label.loser-team{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-decoration:line-through;} .ko-team-label.fr-team{color:#6eb3ff;font-weight:700;} .ko-team-label.champion-team{color:#f0c84a;font-weight:700;} .ko-input{width:24px;height:20px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;color:#fff;text-align:center;font-size:11px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-weight:600;padding:0;-moz-appearance:textfield;} .ko-input::-webkit-inner-spin-button,.ko-input::-webkit-outer-spin-button{-webkit-appearance:none;} .ko-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.12);} .ko-input:disabled{opacity:0.3;cursor:not-allowed;} .ko-date{font-size:7.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.22);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;padding-top:1px;} .ko-tiebreak{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);margin-top:1px;} .ko-tiebreak label{font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:0.5px;} .ko-tiebreak input[type=radio]{margin:0;cursor:pointer;width:10px;height:10px;} .trophy-final{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 6px 6px;} .trophy-icon{font-size:32px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(240,200,74,0.5));} .trophy-text{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;color:#f0c84a;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.4;} .trophy-champion{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(240,200,74,0.18),rgba(196,158,43,0.12));border:1px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.5);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;text-align:center;margin-top:6px;width:100%;} .trophy-champion-flag{font-size:28px;line-height:1;display:block;} .trophy-champion-name{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;color:#f0c84a;margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;} .trophy-empty{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);letter-spacing:1px;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px;} /* AWARDS */ .awards-section{margin-top:32px;} .awards-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:10px;} @media(max-width:1000px){.awards-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}} @media(max-width:560px){.awards-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .award-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;transition:all 0.2s;} .award-card.filled{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.07);border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.3);} .award-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;} .award-icon{font-size:24px;line-height:1;} .award-titles{flex:1;min-width:0;} .award-name{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;color:#f0c84a;text-transform:uppercase;} .award-desc{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1px;} .award-input{width:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);border-radius:5px;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;padding:7px 9px;letter-spacing:0.3px;} .award-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .award-input::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);} .award-selected{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);border-radius:6px;padding:8px 10px;} .award-flag{font-size:22px;line-height:1;} .award-player-info{flex:1;min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;} .award-player-name{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;letter-spacing:0.3px;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .award-player-name:hover{color:#f0c84a;} .award-player-club{font-size:9.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-style:italic;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .award-clear{background:transparent;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;} .award-clear:hover{border-color:#ff6b6b;color:#ff6b6b;} .footer{text-align:center;margin-top:30px;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);text-transform:uppercase;} .footer-attrib{text-align:center;margin-top:8px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);} .footer-attrib a{color:rgba(240,200,74,0.6);text-decoration:none;} .footer-attrib a:hover{text-decoration:underline;} .footer-copyright{text-align:center;margin-top:10px;font-size:10px;line-height:1.5;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);} .footer-copyright strong{color:rgba(240,200,74,0.7);font-weight:400;} /* MODAL — squad viewer */ .modal-bg{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.78);z-index:1000;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;} .modal-bg.show{display:flex;} .modal{background:#0d1f3c;border:1px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.3);border-radius:10px;max-width:560px;width:100%;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;} .modal-hdr{padding:18px 22px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;position:sticky;top:0;background:#0d1f3c;z-index:1;} .modal-flag{font-size:32px;line-height:1;} .modal-title{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:#f0c84a;text-transform:uppercase;flex:1;margin-left:12px;} .modal-title-wrap{flex:1;} .modal-sub{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-transform:uppercase;} .modal-close{background:transparent;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;} .modal-close:hover{border-color:#f0c84a;color:#f0c84a;} .modal-body{padding:18px 22px;} .squad-sec{margin-bottom:18px;} .squad-sec h3{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;color:#c49e2b;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,158,43,0.2);} .squad-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4px 16px;} @media(max-width:500px){.squad-list{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .squad-item{font-size:12px;padding:5px 4px;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04);display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px;text-decoration:none;border-radius:4px;transition:background 0.15s;} .squad-item:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .squad-name{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);flex:1;letter-spacing:0.3px;} .squad-item:hover .squad-name{color:#f0c84a;} .wiki-icon{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);} .squad-item:hover .wiki-icon{color:#f0c84a;} .squad-item{cursor:pointer;} .squad-arrow{font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);font-weight:700;} .squad-item:hover .squad-arrow{color:#f0c84a;} .squad-age{color:rgba(110,179,255,0.85);font-size:10px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;min-width:34px;text-align:right;} .squad-club{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-size:10px;font-style:italic;white-space:nowrap;max-width:110px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .squad-note{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.4);padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);letter-spacing:0.3px;line-height:1.5;} .squad-note strong{color:#f0c84a;} /* SQUAD — shirt number + meta (age/height) */ .squad-num{align-self:center;flex-shrink:0;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.45);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .squad-item:hover .squad-num{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.22);border-color:#f0c84a;} .squad-meta{color:rgba(110,179,255,0.85);font-size:10px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;text-align:right;letter-spacing:0.2px;} /* COACH line */ .coach-line{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:rgba(110,179,255,0.06);border-left:2px solid rgba(110,179,255,0.4);padding:9px 12px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);letter-spacing:0.3px;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;} .coach-line .coach-ico{font-size:14px;} .coach-line .coach-label{text-transform:uppercase;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;} .coach-line .coach-name{color:#f0c84a;font-weight:600;} .coach-line .coach-nat{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);font-size:11px;} /* LINEUP — pitch */ .lineup-note{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.3px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .formation-badge{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;color:#0d1f3c;background:#f0c84a;padding:3px 12px;border-radius:20px;flex-shrink:0;} .pitch{position:relative;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#143a23 0%,#0f2e1b 100%);border:1px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.25);border-radius:10px;padding:22px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;overflow:hidden;} .pitch::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:8%;right:8%;top:50%;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.14);} .pitch::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:74px;height:74px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14);border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);} .pitch-stripes{position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.025) 0 36px,transparent 36px 72px);pointer-events:none;} .pitch-row{position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:space-evenly;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;z-index:1;} .pl{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;width:62px;} .pl-num{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:#0d1f3c;border:2px solid #f0c84a;color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);} .pl.gk .pl-num{background:#f0c84a;color:#0d1f3c;border-color:#fff;} .pl-name{font-size:9.5px;color:#fff;text-align:center;line-height:1.15;letter-spacing:0.2px;max-width:62px;text-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);overflow:hidden;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;} @media(max-width:500px){.pl{width:52px;}.pl-name{max-width:52px;font-size:9px;}.pl-num{width:30px;height:30px;font-size:13px;}} /* GROUP header clickable */ .ghead{cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .ghead:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.2);} /* PITCH tokens clickable */ .pl{cursor:pointer;} .pl-num{transition:transform 0.12s,box-shadow 0.12s;} .pl:hover .pl-num{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(240,200,74,0.55),0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);} .pl:hover .pl-name{color:#f0c84a;} /* BENCH */ .bench{margin-top:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;} .bench-h{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;color:#c49e2b;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;} .bench-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(118px,1fr));gap:5px;} .bench-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s;} .bench-item:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);} .bench-num{flex-shrink:0;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.4);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .bench-name{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .bench-item:hover .bench-name{color:#f0c84a;} /* PLAYER PROFILE */ .prof-hero{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;margin-bottom:18px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);} .prof-num{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0c84a,#c49e2b);color:#0d1f3c;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:30px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(240,200,74,0.25);} .prof-id{min-width:0;} .prof-name{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;color:#fff;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;line-height:1.1;} .prof-name:hover{color:#f0c84a;} .prof-pos{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:5px;} .prof-cap{color:#f0c84a;} .prof-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;} .prof-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 4px;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);} .prof-k{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);} .prof-v{font-size:13px;color:#fff;text-align:right;} .prof-back{margin-top:18px;width:100%;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.35);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:10px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .prof-back:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);} .squad-goals{color:#f0c84a;} .prof-goals{margin-top:16px;} .prof-goals-title{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(240,200,74,0.85);padding-bottom:8px;} .pg-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);margin-bottom:2px;font-size:12px;} .pg-year{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-weight:600;min-width:38px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);} .pg-opp{flex:1;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);} .pg-stage{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(110,179,255,0.85);white-space:nowrap;} .pg-min{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);min-width:34px;text-align:right;white-space:nowrap;} .pg-pen{color:rgba(240,200,74,0.8);} .pg-click{cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .pg-click:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .pg-go{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);margin-left:2px;} .pg-click:hover .pg-go{color:#f0c84a;} /* Clickable historical scorer who is in a 2026 squad */ .wc-plink{cursor:pointer;color:#f0c84a;border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(240,200,74,0.5);} .wc-plink:hover{border-bottom-style:solid;} /* Historical squads — clickable teams on the match board + per-edition squad list */ .wcm-tlink{cursor:pointer;border-radius:8px;padding:6px;transition:background 0.15s;} .wcm-tlink:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .wcm-tlink:hover .wcm-bname{color:#f0c84a;} .hs-btn{display:block;margin:10px 0 2px;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.35);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .hs-btn:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);} .hs-item{cursor:default;} .hs-item:hover{background:none;} .hs-item.hs-click{cursor:pointer;} .hs-item.hs-click:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} /* SVG ARTWORK — hand-drawn flags & icons replacing emojis */ .svgflag{height:max(15px,1.2em);width:max(15px,1.2em);vertical-align:-0.22em;display:inline-block;object-fit:contain;} .svgico{height:max(14px,1.1em);width:max(14px,1.1em);vertical-align:-0.18em;display:inline-block;object-fit:contain;} .modal-flag .svgflag,.modal-flag .svgico{height:1em;width:1em;vertical-align:-0.12em;} /* Hand-drawn jersey numbers: the SVG card brings its own chrome, drop the round badge's */ .svgn,.pl.gk .pl-num.svgn,.squad-item:hover .squad-num.svgn{background:none;border:none;} .squad-num.svgn,.pl-num.svgn,.bench-num.svgn,.prof-num.svgn{border-radius:13%;box-shadow:none;} .svgn img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block;} /* HISTORICAL PLAYER CAREER CARD + EDITION AWARDS */ .aw-badge{margin-left:6px;font-size:11px;opacity:0.95;} .aw-badge .svgico{height:max(15px,1.2em);width:max(15px,1.2em);} .hp-awards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;} .hp-aw{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.18);font-size:12px;} .hp-aw-ic{font-size:15px;width:22px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;} .hp-aw-n{color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;} .hp-aw-y{margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .hp-aw-who{margin-left:auto;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);text-align:right;} .hp-aw-team{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-size:11px;} .hp-aw-click{cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.15s;} .hp-aw-click:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.12);} /* Clickable participation years in the 2026 profile */ .yr-chip{cursor:pointer;color:#f0c84a;border-bottom:1px dotted rgba(240,200,74,0.5);font-style:normal;} .yr-chip:hover{border-bottom-style:solid;} /* PLAYER STAT SHEET */ .stat-sheet{margin-top:18px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);} .stat-sheet-title{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(240,200,74,0.85);padding-bottom:10px;} .stat-empty{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-style:italic;padding:4px 2px;line-height:1.5;} .stat-nat{margin-bottom:14px;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);} .stat-nat-hd{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:0.4px;padding-bottom:10px;} .stat-nat-sub{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-weight:400;} .stat-nat-row{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);} .stat-nat-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .stat-nat-ic{font-size:14px;width:20px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;} .stat-nat-n{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:#f0c84a;min-width:26px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .stat-nat-l{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);} .stat-nat-yr{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0;text-transform:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-style:italic;} .stat-tiles{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;} .stat-tile{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:3px;padding:12px 4px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);} .stat-ic{font-size:16px;line-height:1;} .stat-val{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .stat-lbl{font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:0.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-align:center;} .stat-eds-title{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);padding:16px 0 8px;} .stat-eds{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;} .stat-ed{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;} .stat-ed-y{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:12px;min-width:38px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .stat-ed-bar{flex:1;height:8px;border-radius:4px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);overflow:hidden;} .stat-ed-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#c49e2b,#f0c84a);} .stat-ed-c{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-size:12px;color:#f0c84a;min-width:18px;text-align:right;font-weight:600;} .stat-note{margin-top:12px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);line-height:1.5;font-style:italic;} /* GROUP MODAL */ .gm-teams{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;} @media(max-width:480px){.gm-teams{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .gm-team{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:7px;padding:9px 11px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .gm-team:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.35);} .gm-team.fr{border-color:rgba(100,179,255,0.4);} .gm-flag{font-size:22px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;} .gm-name{flex:1;font-size:15px;color:#fff;letter-spacing:0.3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .gm-team:hover .gm-name{color:#f0c84a;} .gm-team.fr .gm-name{color:#6eb3ff;} .gm-xi{flex-shrink:0;background:transparent;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:50%;width:28px;height:28px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;} .gm-xi:hover{border-color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.15);} .gm-sec-title{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;color:#c49e2b;text-transform:uppercase;margin:18px 0 8px;padding-bottom:5px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(196,158,43,0.2);} .gm-matches{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;} .gm-match{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border-radius:6px;} .gm-mt{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.4px;} .gm-mt.right{text-align:right;} .gm-mt.left{text-align:left;} /* Simple-mode group fixtures preview (read-only schedule, no score inputs) */ .fx-note{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);letter-spacing:0.4px;text-align:center;margin:2px 0 12px;} .fx-note .svgico{vertical-align:-0.18em;} .fx-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;} .fx-match{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border-radius:6px;} .fx-team{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:0;} .fx-team.right{justify-content:flex-end;} .fx-team.left{justify-content:flex-start;} .fx-team .gm-flag{font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0;} .fx-name{font-size:15px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);letter-spacing:0.3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .fx-team.fr .fx-name{color:#6eb3ff;} .fx-when{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;line-height:1.2;min-width:58px;} .fx-date{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#f0c84a;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.6px;white-space:nowrap;} .fx-time{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);letter-spacing:0.5px;} .gm-score{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);min-width:54px;text-align:center;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .gm-score.played{color:#f0c84a;} .gm-standing{margin-top:0;border-top:none;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;} /* ===== PHASE 3: editor / match builder ===== */ /* formation picker */ .lineup-hint{flex:1;min-width:0;} .form-picker{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:12px;} .form-btn{flex:1;min-width:58px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:1.5px;padding:7px 4px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .form-btn:hover{border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.5);color:#fff;} .form-btn.active{background:#f0c84a;border-color:#f0c84a;color:#0d1f3c;font-weight:600;} /* drag states */ .pl,.bench-item{touch-action:none;} .pl.dragging,.bench-item.dragging{opacity:0.3;} .drag-ghost{position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:3000;opacity:0.95;transform:scale(1.05);filter:drop-shadow(0 6px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.6));} .pl.drop-hl .pl-num{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #4caf50,0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);} .bench-item.drop-hl{background:rgba(76,175,80,0.25);outline:1px solid #4caf50;} /* match builder header */ .mb-bar{margin-bottom:10px;} .mb-back{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.3);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:6px 12px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;} .mb-back:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);} .mb-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.25);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;margin-bottom:14px;} .mb-team{background:transparent;border:0.5px solid transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:6px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .mb-team:first-of-type{text-align:right;} .mb-team:hover{color:#fff;border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.4);} .mb-team.active{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.14);border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.5);color:#f0c84a;} .mb-score{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;color:#f0c84a;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;min-width:60px;text-align:center;} /* events log */ .ev-log{margin-top:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;} .ev-log-h{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:3px;color:#c49e2b;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:9px;} .ev-empty{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-style:italic;} .ev-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:20px 22px 1fr auto 22px;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 4px;border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);font-size:12px;} .ev-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .ev-ic{font-size:13px;} .ev-team{font-size:15px;} .ev-name{color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .ev-lbl{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);} .ev-t0 .ev-lbl{color:#7ddc8a;} .ev-t1 .ev-lbl{color:#7db8ff;} .ev-t2 .ev-lbl{color:#ff8a8a;} .ev-del{background:transparent;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;padding:2px;line-height:1;} .ev-del:hover{color:#ff6b6b;} /* mini popover */ .mini-pop-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(5,12,28,0.72);backdrop-filter:blur(3px);z-index:2500;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;} .mini-pop-bg.show{display:flex;} .mini-pop{background:#0d1f3c;border:1px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.3);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;width:100%;max-width:320px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);animation:mpIn 0.16s ease;} @keyframes mpIn{from{transform:scale(0.92);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}} .mp-title{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;letter-spacing:0.5px;text-align:center;} .mp-stars{text-align:center;color:#f0c84a;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:3px;margin-top:3px;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(240,200,74,0.45);} .mp-sub{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);text-align:center;margin:4px 0 16px;} .mp-btns{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;} .mp-b{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .mp-goal:hover{background:rgba(76,175,80,0.22);border-color:#4caf50;} .mp-assist:hover{background:rgba(100,160,255,0.22);border-color:#64a0ff;} .mp-red:hover{background:rgba(255,80,80,0.22);border-color:#ff5050;} .mp-cancel{width:100%;margin-top:12px;background:transparent;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;} .mp-cancel:hover{color:#fff;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);} .mp-posrow{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px;} .mp-pos{width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);color:#fff;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .mp-pos:hover{border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.6);background:rgba(240,200,74,0.12);} .mp-pos.active{background:#f0c84a;border-color:#f0c84a;color:#0d1f3c;} .mp-pos.glow{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.35);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(240,200,74,0.22),inset 0 0 6px rgba(240,200,74,0.08);text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(240,200,74,0.55);} .mp-pos.glow:hover{box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(240,200,74,0.4),inset 0 0 8px rgba(240,200,74,0.14);} .mp-pos.glow.active{text-shadow:none;box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(240,200,74,0.55);} /* position badge in group standings */ .pos-badge{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;padding:0;line-height:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all 0.15s;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .pos-badge:hover{border-color:#f0c84a;color:#f0c84a;} .pos-badge.set{background:#f0c84a;border-color:#f0c84a;color:#0d1f3c;} .gm-standing .srank{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;} .gm-pos-hint{font-size:8px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);text-transform:none;} /* group-modal match rows become buttons */ .gm-match .gm-mt{background:transparent;border:0.5px solid transparent;font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;border-radius:5px;padding:5px 7px;} .gm-match .gm-mt:hover{color:#f0c84a;border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.35);background:rgba(240,200,74,0.06);} .gm-evn{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#7ddc8a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;min-width:24px;text-align:left;} .gm-mscore{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;} .gm-mscore .sinput{width:26px;height:24px;font-size:13px;} .stats-section{margin-top:32px;} .global-stats-wrap{max-width:760px;} .global-stats-wrap .stat-col{background:rgba(13,31,60,0.55);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.09);padding:14px;} .global-stats-wrap .stat-h{font-size:11px;} .global-stats-wrap .stat-row{font-size:12px;padding:7px 4px;} .global-stats-wrap .stat-fl{font-size:16px;} .global-stats-wrap .stat-ct{font-size:15px;} .global-stats-wrap .gm-stats-empty{padding:14px 4px;} .gm-mscore .sinput{width:26px;height:24px;font-size:13px;} /* tap-to-swap selection highlight */ .pl.swap-sel .pl-num{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #f0c84a,0 0 14px rgba(240,200,74,0.7);animation:swapPulse 1s ease-in-out infinite;} .pl.swap-sel .pl-name{color:#f0c84a;} .bench-item.swap-sel{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.2);outline:1px solid #f0c84a;} @keyframes swapPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #f0c84a,0 0 8px rgba(240,200,74,0.5);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #f0c84a,0 0 18px rgba(240,200,74,0.9);}} /* eligible swap targets light up; ineligible (GK<->field) dim */ .pl.swap-target .pl-num{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #4caf50,0 0 12px rgba(76,175,80,0.65);animation:tgtPulse 1.1s ease-in-out infinite;cursor:pointer;} .bench-item.swap-target{outline:1px dashed #4caf50;background:rgba(76,175,80,0.14);cursor:pointer;} .bench-item.swap-target .bench-num{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #4caf50,0 0 8px rgba(76,175,80,0.6);} @keyframes tgtPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #4caf50,0 0 6px rgba(76,175,80,0.4);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #4caf50,0 0 14px rgba(76,175,80,0.85);}} .pl.swap-dim,.bench-item.swap-dim{opacity:0.32;} /* bench player role tag */ .bench-pos{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.5px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;margin-left:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);} .bench-pos.pos-G{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);color:#f0c84a;} .bench-pos.pos-D{background:rgba(100,180,255,0.16);color:#8ec5ff;} .bench-pos.pos-M{background:rgba(120,220,140,0.16);color:#8fe6a4;} .bench-pos.pos-A{background:rgba(255,130,130,0.16);color:#ffa3a3;} /* combined Buteurs/Passeurs ranking — single card, group-sized */ .cs-card{max-width:340px;} .cs-body{padding:6px 0 4px;} .cs-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:22px 1fr 24px 24px 26px;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 10px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.32);text-transform:uppercase;} .cs-head span:nth-child(n+3){text-align:center;} .cs-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:22px 1fr 24px 24px 26px;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:6px 10px;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s;} .cs-row:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .cs-rk{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .cs-nm{color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .cs-row:hover .cs-nm{color:#f0c84a;} .cs-g,.cs-a,.cs-tot{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-weight:700;text-align:center;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .cs-g{color:#8fe6a4;font-size:13px;} .cs-a{color:#8ec5ff;font-size:13px;} .cs-tot{color:#f0c84a;font-size:14px;} .cs-body .gm-stats-empty{padding:14px 12px;} /* save / reset composition toolbar */ .comp-tools{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;} .comp-btn{flex:1;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:9px 6px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);transition:all 0.15s;} .comp-reset:hover{border-color:#ff8a8a;color:#ff8a8a;background:rgba(255,80,80,0.12);} .comp-save{border-color:rgba(120,220,140,0.4);color:#8fe6a4;} .comp-save:hover{background:rgba(76,175,80,0.16);border-color:#4caf50;} .comp-save.dirty{background:#4caf50;border-color:#4caf50;color:#08210e;font-weight:600;animation:saveGlow 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;} @keyframes saveGlow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(76,175,80,0.5);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(76,175,80,0);}} /* editable score in the match builder header */ .mb-score-edit{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:3px;} .mb-score-edit .sinput{width:34px;height:30px;font-size:17px;} /* unified player chooser: split into two columns by a line */ .mp-split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;margin-bottom:10px;} .mp-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;padding:0 12px;} .mp-col-left{border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);} .mp-col-h{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2px;} .mp-split .mp-b{font-size:13px;padding:10px 10px;} .mp-clear{width:100%;margin-top:4px;background:rgba(255,80,80,0.1);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,120,120,0.3);color:#ff9a9a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1px;padding:8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;} .mp-clear:hover{background:rgba(255,80,80,0.2);} /* free-event tally badge on tokens */ .pl .fev{position:absolute;bottom:-7px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:8px;white-space:nowrap;background:rgba(8,18,38,0.92);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.4);border-radius:8px;padding:0 4px;line-height:13px;} .pl{position:relative;} .bench-item .fev{font-size:9px;margin-left:auto;padding-left:6px;white-space:nowrap;} .mp-swap:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.2);border-color:#f0c84a;} .mp-prof:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);} /* chip position badge (replaces old squad icon) */ .gm-pos{flex-shrink:0;width:30px;height:30px;font-size:14px;} /* scorers & assisters */ .stat-cols{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;} @media(max-width:460px){.stat-cols{grid-template-columns:1fr;}} .stat-col{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.18);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;} .stat-h{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;color:#c49e2b;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;} .stat-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:16px 18px 1fr 22px;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 2px;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s;border-radius:4px;} .stat-row:first-of-type{border-top:none;} .stat-row:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .stat-rk{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .stat-fl{font-size:14px;} .stat-nm{color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .stat-row:hover .stat-nm{color:#f0c84a;} .stat-ct{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#f0c84a;text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;} .stat-empty{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-style:italic;} .gm-stats-empty{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);font-style:italic;padding:4px 2px;} /* ===== MODE SWITCH (simple / in-depth) ===== */ .mode-switch{display:flex;gap:3px;justify-content:center;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border-radius:8px;padding:3px;margin:0 auto 16px;width:fit-content;} .mode-btn{background:transparent;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} .mode-btn:hover{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);} .mode-btn.active{background:#f0c84a;color:#0a1628;} .mode-btn.locked{opacity:0.35;cursor:not-allowed;} .mode-btn.locked:hover{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);} .mode-btn.locked::after{content:'';width:12px;height:12px;background:url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHZpZXdCb3g9IjMwLjUgMzEuOCA1OS44IDcxLjciIHdpZHRoPSI2MCIgaGVpZ2h0PSI3MiI+PGRlZnM+PC9kZWZzPjxnIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTQ0LjksNjEuMiBMNDQuOSw1OC44IEw0NS4wLDU2LjQgTDQ1LjIsNTQuMCBMNDUuMyw1MS41IEw0NS42LDQ5LjAgTDQ1LjgsNDYuNCBMNDYuNCw0NC4zIEw0Ny43LDQyLjUgTDQ5LjUsNDEuMSBMNTEuNyw0MC4xIEw1NC4zLDM5LjQgTDU3LjIsMzkuMCBMNjAuMiwzOC44IEw2My4yLDM5LjEgTDY2LjEsMzkuNiBMNjguOCw0MC41IEw3MS4xLDQxLjYgTDcyLjksNDMuMCBMNzQuMSw0NC42IEw3NC41LDQ2LjUgTDc0LjQsNDguNyBMNzQuNCw1MC45IEw3NC4zLDUzLjIgTDc0LjMsNTUuNSBMNzQuMyw1Ny44IEw3NC4zLDYwLjEiIGZpbGw9Im5vbmUiIHN0cm9rZT0iI0Y0RUNEQiIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSI1LjIiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIvPjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik03Ny42LDU1LjggTDgwLjUsNTYuMiBMODIuNiw1Ny44IEw4My4zLDYwLjMgTDgzLjMsNjIuNyBMODMuMyw2NS4yIEw4My4yLDY3LjcgTDgzLjIsNzAuMyBMODMuMiw3Mi45IEw4My4xLDc1LjUgTDgzLjEsNzguMSBMODMuMSw4MC42IEw4My4xLDgzLjIgTDgzLjAsODUuNiBMODMuMCw4OC4wIEw4My4wLDkwLjQgTDgzLjAsOTIuNiBMODIuMSw5NC44IEw4MC4wLDk2LjIgTDc3LjMsOTYuNSBMNzQuOSw5Ni4xIEw3Mi41LDk1LjcgTDcwLjEsOTUuNCBMNjcuOCw5NS4wIEw2NS40LDk0LjcgTDYzLjAsOTQuNSBMNjAuNyw5NC40IEw1OC40LDk0LjMgTDU2LjIsOTQuNCBMNTQuMCw5NC42IEw1MS44LDk0LjggTDQ5LjYsOTUuMSBMNDcuNSw5NS40IEw0NS4zLDk1LjcgTDQzLjIsOTYuMSBMNDAuOCw5NS44IEwzOS4wLDk0LjIgTDM4LjMsOTEuOCBMMzguMyw4OS41IEwzOC4zLDg3LjIgTDM4LjIsODQuOSBMMzguMiw4Mi43IEwzOC4xLDgwLjQgTDM4LjAsNzguMSBMMzcuOSw3NS44IEwzNy45LDczLjUgTDM3LjgsNzEuMyBMMzcuNyw2OS4wIEwzNy42LDY2LjcgTDM3LjUsNjQuNCBMMzcuNSw2Mi4xIEwzOC4xLDU5LjYgTDM5LjksNTcuOCBMNDIuMyw1Ny4xIFoiIGZpbGw9IiNGMkMyMEUiIHN0cm9rZT0iI0Y0RUNEQiIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSI0LjYiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIvPjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik02Mi43LDcyLjAgTDYyLjMsNzMuNiBMNjEuMCw3NC43IEw1OS4yLDc1LjEgTDU3LjMsNzQuNyBMNTYuMCw3My42IEw1NS40LDcyLjEgTDU1LjgsNzAuNSBMNTcuMCw2OS4zIEw1OC44LDY4LjkgTDYwLjcsNjkuMyBMNjIuMSw3MC41IFoiIGZpbGw9IiMxNDEyMTAiIHN0cm9rZT0iIzE0MTIxMCIgc3Ryb2tlLXdpZHRoPSIwLjAiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lY2FwPSJyb3VuZCIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVqb2luPSJyb3VuZCIvPjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik01OS4wLDcyLjAgTDU5LjEsNzQuMCBMNTkuMiw3Ni4xIEw1OS4zLDc4LjIgTDU5LjQsODAuMyBMNTkuNSw4Mi41IiBmaWxsPSJub25lIiBzdHJva2U9IiMxNDEyMTAiIHN0cm9rZS13aWR0aD0iNC4yIiBzdHJva2UtbGluZWNhcD0icm91bmQiIHN0cm9rZS1saW5lam9pbj0icm91bmQiLz48L2c+PC9zdmc+') center/contain no-repeat;} /* section ordering — flex column so simple mode can move awards under the bracket */ #phases{display:flex;flex-direction:column;} #sec-groups{order:1;} #sec-awards{order:2;} #sec-stats{order:3;} #sec-ko{order:4;} #phases.mode-simple #sec-ko{order:2;} #phases.mode-simple #sec-awards{order:3;} #phases.mode-simple #sec-stats{display:none;} /* ---- final details inside team history rows ---- */ .fin-tag{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:0.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#f0c84a;background:rgba(240,200,74,0.12);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.3);border-radius:4px;padding:1px 5px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;} .wch-fin{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);white-space:nowrap;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;} .wch-champion .wch-fin{color:rgba(240,200,74,0.9);} /* ===== SIMPLE GROUP CARD (ranking, no scores/matches) ===== */ .gsimple{padding:5px 0 6px;} .grow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:26px 24px 1fr;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 10px;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s;} .grow:first-child{border-top:none;} .grow:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.08);} .grow.q{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.07);} .grow.q:hover{background:rgba(0,180,80,0.13);} .grow.q3{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.05);} .grow.q3:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.11);} .grow .gr-flag{font-size:18px;line-height:1;text-align:center;} .grow .gr-name{font-size:14px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.9);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .grow:hover .gr-name{color:#f0c84a;} .grow.fr .gr-name{color:#6eb3ff;font-weight:700;} .pos-badge.r1,.pos-badge.r2{background:#4caf50;border-color:#4caf50;color:#08210e;} .pos-badge.r3{background:#f0c84a;border-color:#f0c84a;color:#0d1f3c;} .pos-badge.unset{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);border-style:dashed;} .gsimple-hint{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.4px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-align:center;padding:6px 8px 2px;text-transform:none;} /* drag-to-reorder rows (simple mode) */ .grow,.gm-team{touch-action:none;} .grow{cursor:grab;} .grow:active{cursor:grabbing;} .row-dragging{opacity:0.25;} .row-ghost{box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.55);border-radius:6px;background:#10254a !important;} .grow .pos-badge{cursor:inherit;} /* third-place ranking card (simple mode) */ .gcard.thirds .ghead{background:rgba(120,90,30,0.22);border-color:rgba(196,158,43,0.3);} .grow.th{grid-template-columns:24px 20px 1fr auto;gap:7px;padding:5px 9px;} .grow.th .gr-name{font-size:12.5px;} .gr-tag{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:8px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 5px;} .grow.th.nq{opacity:0.4;} .grow.th.nq .gr-name{text-decoration:line-through;} .grow.th.placeholder .gr-name{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);font-style:italic;} .pos-badge.rq{background:#4caf50;border-color:#4caf50;color:#08210e;} .thirds-hint{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:0.3px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);text-align:center;padding:6px 8px 2px;} /* simple group modal — team lines with rank badge */ .gm-team .gm-rankbadge{flex-shrink:0;margin-right:2px;} .gm-team-hint{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);letter-spacing:0.3px;margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.5;} /* TEAM CHOICE popover (squad vs composition) */ .tc-b{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;text-align:left;width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;padding:14px 16px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;} .tc-b:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.14);border-color:#f0c84a;} .tc-ic{font-size:26px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;} .tc-tx{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;min-width:0;} .tc-tt{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.5px;} .tc-ds{font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:0.2px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);} .tc-b:hover .tc-tt{color:#f0c84a;} /* TOAST */ .toast{position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#4caf50;color:#fff;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:6px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:2000;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;pointer-events:none;} .toast.show{opacity:1;} /* H2H BADGE */ .h2h-btn{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);border:0.5px solid rgba(240,200,74,0.4);color:#f0c84a;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:7px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.8px;padding:2px 5px;border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;transition:all 0.12s;line-height:1.4;} .h2h-btn:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.25);border-color:#f0c84a;} .ko-h2h{text-align:center;padding:3px 0 1px;} /* WC HISTORY MODAL */ .wch-stats{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);padding:6px 2px 12px;letter-spacing:0.5px;text-align:center;} .wch-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;} .wch-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);} .wch-year{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;min-width:38px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);} .wch-icon{font-size:14px;min-width:20px;text-align:center;} .wch-label{flex:1;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8);} .wch-champion{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.1);border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.25);} .wch-champion .wch-year,.wch-champion .wch-label{color:#f0c84a;} .wch-runner_up{background:rgba(180,180,200,0.07);} .wch-runner_up .wch-label{color:rgba(200,200,220,0.9);} .wch-3rd{background:rgba(200,130,60,0.07);} .wch-3rd .wch-label{color:rgba(220,160,90,0.9);} .wch-4th{background:rgba(180,120,50,0.05);} .wch-click{cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s,border-color 0.12s,transform 0.12s;} .wch-click:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.18);transform:translateX(2px);} .wch-champion.wch-click:hover{background:rgba(240,200,74,0.18);border-color:rgba(240,200,74,0.5);} .wch-go{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);font-weight:300;transition:color 0.12s;} .wch-click:hover .wch-go{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);} /* WC YEAR — TOURNAMENT RUN */ .wcy-back{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.8px;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;margin-bottom:12px;transition:all 0.12s;text-transform:uppercase;} .wcy-back:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);color:#fff;} .wcy-result{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);padding:10px;border-radius:6px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin-bottom:10px;} .wcy-result.wch-champion{color:#f0c84a;} .wcy-result.wch-runner_up{color:rgba(200,200,220,0.95);} .wcy-result.wch-3rd{color:rgba(220,160,90,0.95);} .wcy-result-ic{font-size:18px;} .wcy-statline{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .wcy-chip{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.6px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);padding:3px 10px;border-radius:10px;} .wcy-cw{color:#7bc67e;border-color:rgba(76,175,80,0.3);} .wcy-cd{color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);} .wcy-cl{color:#e57373;border-color:rgba(244,67,54,0.25);} .wcy-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;} .wcy-row{padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border-left-width:2px;} .wcy-row.wcy-w{border-left-color:rgba(76,175,80,0.7);background:rgba(76,175,80,0.05);} .wcy-row.wcy-l{border-left-color:rgba(244,67,54,0.6);background:rgba(244,67,54,0.04);} .wcy-row.wcy-d{border-left-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);} .wcy-main{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;} .wcy-round{font-size:8px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:0.4px;text-transform:uppercase;min-width:74px;line-height:1.3;} .wcy-opp{flex:1;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;min-width:0;} .wcy-flag{font-size:14px;line-height:1;} .wcy-score{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#fff;white-space:nowrap;text-align:right;} .wcy-score.wcy-wo{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase;} .wcy-pen{display:block;font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);} .wcy-scorers{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);padding:3px 0 1px 82px;line-height:1.5;} .wcy-row.wcy-click{cursor:pointer;transition:background 0.12s,border-color 0.12s,transform 0.12s;} .wcy-row.wcy-click:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);transform:translateX(2px);} /* WC MATCH DETAIL */ .wcm-board{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;gap:10px;align-items:start;padding:16px 4px 12px;} .wcm-team{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:7px;min-width:0;} .wcm-bflag{font-size:36px;line-height:1;} .wcm-bname{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.85);text-align:center;line-height:1.3;} .wcm-mid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding-top:4px;} .wcm-score{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;line-height:1;white-space:nowrap;} .wcm-pens{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#f0c84a;white-space:nowrap;} .wcm-note{font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:0.5px;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;} .wcm-goals{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;margin:8px 0 4px;padding:10px 6px;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);} .wcm-goal{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.75);max-width:75%;line-height:1.4;} .wcm-g1{align-self:flex-start;text-align:left;} .wcm-g2{align-self:flex-end;text-align:right;} .wcm-nogoals{text-align:center;font-size:10px;font-style:italic;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);padding:10px 0;border-top:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-bottom:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);margin:8px 0 4px;} .wcm-meta{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;align-items:center;margin-top:12px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-align:center;line-height:1.4;} /* H2H MODAL */ .h2h-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;padding:10px 0 4px;font-size:30px;line-height:1;} .h2h-vs{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:11px;font-weight:400;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);letter-spacing:2px;} .h2h-count{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:0.8px;margin-bottom:14px;text-transform:uppercase;} .h2h-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;} .h2h-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);font-size:12px;} .h2h-row.h2h-w{border-color:rgba(76,175,80,0.25);background:rgba(76,175,80,0.06);} .h2h-row.h2h-l{border-color:rgba(244,67,54,0.2);background:rgba(244,67,54,0.04);} .h2h-year{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;min-width:36px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);} .h2h-round{flex:1;font-size:9px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.4);letter-spacing:0.3px;text-transform:uppercase;} .h2h-score{font-family:'Basquiat Raw',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;color:#fff;} .h2h-pen{font-size:10px;font-weight:400;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-left:3px;}
